## IDEEAS Lab Team {.smaller}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="20%"}
<!-- Add headshot: images/headshots/katz.jpg -->

**Dr. Andrew Katz**\
Principal Investigator
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
<!-- Add headshot: images/headshots/gerhardt.jpg -->

**Mitch Gerhardt**\
PhD Student
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
<!-- Add headshot: images/headshots/shiekh.jpg -->

**Kylee Shiekh**\
PhD Student
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
<!-- Add headshot: images/headshots/chaback.jpg -->

**Benjamin Chaback**\
PhD Student
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
<!-- Add headshot: images/headshots/li.jpg -->

**Nathan Li**\
PhD Student
:::

::::

::: {.smaller}
*Improving Decisions across Engineering Education Agents and Systems*

<!-- Replace #XXXXXXX with actual grant number. Add NSF logo: ![](../../images/nsf_logo.png){width=60px} -->
Supported by NSF Award #XXXXXXX
:::
